div.h2: M2 - Consumer Groups, ACK/NACK & Poison Detection

g.text: HandleNack(msgID: uint64, consumerID: string, reason: string)

ol.li: At-Least-Once Delivery: Unacked messages are redelivered after VisibilityTimeout.
Membership: Rebalance occurs on any Join() or Leave() call within 5s grace period.
Poison Control: RetryCounter.Get(msgID) > MaxRetries triggers immediate move to PoisonQueue.
Concurrency: All internal maps must be protected by a RWMutex or a serialized command channel.

g.text: PoisonMessage: Quarantined for manual DLQ inspection via Admin API
PartitionAssignment: Sticky sessions for data locality and performance
